figures.caption: Fig. 1. Computing stack highlighting the searchable design space spanning different levels, for 2.5D and 3D chiplet-based systems.

Fig. 2. Hierarchical multi-agent iterative framework of CHICO-Agent with admin agents and field agents. N (default = 100) sets the number of parallel field agents spawned per iteration, and max iterations governs how many complete iterations the framework executes.
Fig. 3. The admin agent iteration loop with three phases. Green rectangles denote stages where the LLM performs active reasoning, whose depth is controlled by the reasoning effort hyperparameter.

Fig. 4. Runtime vs. cost Pareto frontiers of WL-6 for (a) automotive, (b) balance, (c) mobile, and (d) wearables optimization profiles. All other workloads have similar trends, please refer to our GitHub repository [9].
TABLE III BEST COST ACHIEVED BY CHICO-AGENT AND SA [4] WITH ELAPSED TIME.
